test.name: facet filter mode SQL review coverage

queries.sphinxql: create table facet_sql_review ( title text, brand_id integer, color_id integer, color_name string, size_id integer, size_name string, sku string )

insert into facet_sql_review ( id, title, brand_id, color_id, color_name, size_id, size_name, sku ) values (1,'p1',7,1,'red',10,'small','sku1'), (2,'p2',7,1,'red',20,'large','sku2'), (3,'p3',7,2,'blue',10,'small','sku3'), (4,'p4',7,3,'green',30,'xlarge','sku4'), (5,'p5',8,1,'red',10,'small','sku5'), (6,'p6',8,4,'black',20,'large','sku6'), (7,'p7',9,5,'white',10,'small','sku7')
SELECT count(*) FROM facet_sql_review WHERE brand_id=7 OR color_id=1 LIMIT 0 OPTION facet_filter_mode='auto' FACET color_id
SELECT count(*) FROM facet_sql_review WHERE brand_id=7 OR color_id=1 LIMIT 0 OPTION facet_filter_mode='max' FACET color_id
SELECT count(*) FROM facet_sql_review WHERE brand_id=7 AND color_id NOT IN (4) LIMIT 0 OPTION facet_filter_mode='strict' FACET color_id ORDER BY FACET() ASC;
SELECT count(*) FROM facet_sql_review WHERE brand_id=7 AND color_id NOT IN (4) LIMIT 0 OPTION facet_filter_mode='auto' FACET color_id ORDER BY FACET() ASC
